    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages

    C

    category - Enum Class in models
    Represents the available expense categories in the system.
    checkThreshold(double) - Method in class Logic.NotificationController
    Checks the current budget usage percentage and triggers notifications based on predefined thresholds.
    connect() - Static method in class persistance.connection
    Establishes and returns a connection to the SQLite database.
    connection - Class in persistance
    Utility class responsible for managing the database connection.
    connection() - Constructor for class persistance.connection
     
    createBudgetCycle(double, Date, Date) - Method in class Logic.BudgetController
    Creates a new budget cycle after validating the input data.
    createBudgetCycle(BudgetCycle) - Method in class persistance.Datapersistance
    Creates a new budget cycle and deactivates previous active cycles.
    createBudgetCycle(BudgetCycle) - Method in interface persistance.IPersistence
    Creates a new budget cycle.
    createTables() - Static method in class persistance.DatabaseSetup
    Creates all application tables in the SQLite database.
    createUser(user) - Method in class persistance.Datapersistance
    Creates a new user in the database.
    createUser(user) - Method in interface persistance.IPersistence
    Creates a new user in the system.
